transcript.message: Hello, thank you for taking the time to speak with me today. My name is Rohan, and I'm a recruiter here at FinSpark, a fintech company that's passionate about using AI to drive innovation in the financial industry. I'd love to learn more about your background and experience. Can you tell me a bit about your current role and what you've been working on lately?

I'm Naina Trivedi, nice to speak with you, Rohan. Currently, I'm working as an HR Manager at Hooli, where I've been involved in implementing various HR initiatives and processes. Lately, I've been focusing on developing and maintaining our company's employee engagement strategies, which involve using some of the latest HR tech tools and methodologies, including Six Sigma and Figma.

It sounds like you've been working on some really interesting projects at Hooli, but I'm actually looking for a Senior AI Engineer to join our team. Can you tell me a bit about your background in AI and engineering, and what motivated you to apply for this role at FinSpark?

I don't have direct experience as a Senior AI Engineer, but I do have some knowledge of AI concepts and tools, particularly in the area of natural language processing. I've worked with Hugging Face Transformers and Sentence Transformers, and I've also explored some of the Vector Search and Embeddings libraries. I'm interested in learning more about the role and how my skills might be applicable.

It's great that you have some experience with AI concepts and tools, and I appreciate your willingness to learn more about the role. What specifically drew you to this Senior AI Engineer position at FinSpark, and what do you think you could bring to our team in terms of your skills and experience?

I'm drawn to FinSpark's mission of using AI to drive innovation in the financial industry, and I'm interested in exploring how my skills in areas like natural language processing and Vector Search might be applied in a fintech context. I think my experience with tools like Hugging Face Transformers and my understanding of concepts like Embeddings could be valuable in a team focused on developing and implementing AI solutions.

It sounds like you have a strong foundation in AI concepts and tools, and you're excited about the opportunity to apply them in a fintech context. Can you tell me a bit about your expectations in terms of compensation for this role, and what you're looking for in a salary package?

I'm not sure I'm the best fit for this Senior AI Engineer role, considering my background is more in HR and I don't have direct experience as an engineer. However, I'm open to discussing the role further and exploring how my skills might be applicable.

It sounds like you're being honest about your background and experience, and I appreciate your willingness to explore the role further. If you were to consider this position, what would be your ideal notice period, and are you available to start working with us in the next few months?

I'm not sure I'm the right fit for this role, considering my background is more in HR and I don't have direct experience as an engineer. However, if I were to consider this position, I would need a standard notice period of 90 days to ensure a smooth transition at Hooli.

Thank you so much, Naina, for being open and honest about your background and experience. I appreciate the time you took to speak with me today, and I wish you all the best in your future endeavors. I'll be in touch within the next few days to let you know the next steps, and I'll also make sure to keep your profile on file in case any other opportunities arise that might be a better fit for your skills and experience. Take care, and I hope our paths cross again soon.

Thank you, Rohan, for your kind words and for taking the time to speak with me today. I appreciate your understanding of my background and experience, and I'm glad I could have an open and honest conversation with you. I wish FinSpark all the best in finding the right candidate for the Senior AI Engineer role, and I look forward to hearing from you if any other opportunities arise that might be a good fit for me. Have a great day!
